bootstrap_dev.sh --skip-install records pip-audit as skipped when isolated pip upgrade cannot complete in the local skip-install environment; the script exits 0 and writes the expected skipped report without tracked diff.
file_size_report.json records existing soft warnings only; no hard violations remain and the new export worker handler is at the worker_handler soft limit.

phase_notes.plan: Implement M6-001 only: zip export must succeed without Docker, create ExportArtifact through POST /projects/{id}/export, produce manifest/hash-verified zip artifacts, expose exported runtime native and OpenAI-compatible endpoints, reuse/copy the M5 router inference core, validate bearer auth and model cache contract, and avoid bundling secrets or base-model weights.
phase_notes.audit: Read WORKING, CONTEXT, M6 handoff, IMPLEMENTATION_GUIDE M6-001/M6-002 boundary, Dev Plan Phase 6 acceptance, export_manifest schema, existing runtime template/loaders/tests, export secret scanner, model catalog, job and ExportArtifact models, and existing job/API patterns.
phase_notes.build: Implemented zip export API/service/store, worker handler, manifest and artifact hash verification, exported runtime native and OpenAI-compatible endpoints, backend loader invocation hooks, copied deterministic router inference core, model-cache/bearer-token runtime checks, and focused export/runtime/security/parity tests.
phase_notes.check: Passed bootstrap m1-smoke, task JSON, py_compile, tests/export, runtime template smoke, playground plus AgentPackage verifier regression, export secret scan self-test, import boundary, file-size hard-limit, unstaged diff whitespace, and staged diff whitespace checks.
phase_notes.done: Pending commit and push after verification passes.

pabcd.approved_scope: M6-001 zip export API/service/store, worker handler, exported runtime template/loaders, manifest/security/parity tests, artifacts, and WORKING closeout within listed files.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No DB schema/model/migration, Docker export, Local Daemon /agents/{agent_id}/run route, FE, training/eval/benchmark behavior, AgentPackage builder, or docs spec/foundation edits.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification passes, stage, commit, and push this phase.
